# BalloonParty — AI Coding Instructions

The coding conventions for this repo have a **single source of truth**:

- **[`/CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md)** — compact, always-loaded reference (architecture, code
  rules, verification, workflow).
- **`Assets/Source/README.md`** — the authoritative full style guide.

Follow those. This file intentionally holds no conventions of its own to avoid drift.
